creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-04-29 06:17:49 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Version-Requirements Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Version::Requirements object models a set of version constraints like those
  specified in the META.yml or META.json files in CPAN distributions. It can
  be built up by adding more and more constraints, and it will reduce them to
  the simplest representation.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Version-Requirements/
  
  PR:             ports/145881
  Submitted by:   Ju Pengfei <jupengfei@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3904    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/devel/p5-Version-Requirements/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Version-Requirements/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Version-Requirements/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Version-Requirements/pkg-plist (new)
